observations.axis: Connection to the Past vs. Loss of the Past
observations.polarity: Connection to the past (left) vs. loss of the past (right)
observations.summary: The object in his hand symbolizes a tangible connection to his father as he was, contrasting with the reality that the father is now lost to him.

left_evidence.quote: It felt right in his hand—solid, balanced, real. A connection to the man his father had been

right_evidence.quote: even if that man was lost now.

bridge_evidence.quote: It felt right in his hand—solid, balanced, real. A connection to the man his father had been, even if that man was lost now.
